title: rosa × nitidula var. blondaeana
intro: Rosa × nitidula var. blondaeana, also known as Blond's Rosa or Rosa × nitidula var. blondaeana, is a variety of rose that is known for its distinct characteristics and medicinal properties. As a plant, it is valued for its ability to produce rose hips, which are rich in vitamin C and have been used to treat scurvy and other health issues. The rose hips from this plant have been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and syrups to promote health and well-being, with benefits including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, as well as the potential to support immune function and reduce the severity of colds and flu. Additionally, Rosa × nitidula var. blondaeana has been used in herbal preparations to treat digestive issues and promote wound healing, making it a valuable plant in traditional herbal medicine.
